title: coupon — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-facing admin surfaces (coupon CRUD + bulk issue + redemption ledger + reverse action + weekly report) + tenant-facing customer surfaces (validate/preview only — NEVER a POST /redeem, redemption is an internal service call inside the invoice/membership creation transaction) + platform-plane cross-tenant read for support intervention. Every admin tenant route carries `entitlement.enforce:coupon_capture`; bulk-issue additionally requires `coupon_bulk_issue`; the preview endpoint is rate-limited via `coupon.rate_limit` middleware (10/IP/hour) to prevent brute-force code enumeration.

routes.description: filter[is_active], filter[discount_type], filter[applicability], filter[issuance_source], filter[campaign_name], filter[valid_until.before/after], filter[usage_cap_reached] (bool derived). include=redemption_count.
Body: CouponCreateData. Consumes 1 unit of `coupon_slot` entitlement. issuance_source defaults to 'manual' (admin UI/API call).
Confidential financial fields redacted for readers without coupons.view-financials permission.

discount_type / discount_amount / applicability fields refuse when any redemption exists (COUPON_TERMS_LOCKED). Other fields (name, description, valid_until, usage_cap, per_customer_limit) freely editable.
Soft-delete only. Refused when any non-reversed redemption exists — deactivate first.
Body: { reason? }. Sets is_active=false. Existing redemptions preserved.
Body: { valid_until }. Push valid_until forward. Refuses when coupon is already deactivated OR when new valid_until <= current NOW().

Medium+ tier. Body: BulkIssueCouponData { count, code_template, campaign_name, ...coupon config }. Generates N unique codes (respects `coupon_slot` cap — refuses when count > remaining slots). Consumes count units of `coupon_slot`.
Redemptions filtered to a specific coupon. filter[customer_type], filter[customer_id], filter[applied_to_type], filter[reversed] (bool).

groups.name: tenant-coupon-redemptions-admin
groups.description: Admin redemption ledger + reverse action. Redemption CREATE is deliberately absent — internal service call only.

routes.description: Full-tenant redemption ledger. filter[coupon_id], filter[customer_type], filter[customer_id], filter[applied_to_type], filter[applied_to_id], filter[reversed] (bool), filter[redeemed_at.gte/lte].

Body: { reason, notes? }. Admin manual reversal (correction path — distinct from refund-cascade clawback). Sets reversed_at + decrements coupon.usage_count. Fires CouponRedemptionReversed. Audit-critical.

groups.name: tenant-coupons-customer
groups.description: Customer-facing validate + preview. There is NO POST /redeem — redemption is an internal service call inside the invoice/membership creation transaction (invoice module calls CouponRedeemer::redeem()). This prevents replay attacks + preserves atomic invoice-level redemption.

routes.description: Pre-checkout validation. Returns { is_valid, refusal_reason?, coupon_summary? }. Does NOT touch the DB counter. Rate-limited via coupon.rate_limit to prevent brute-force code enumeration.

Body: { customer_type, customer_id, applied_to_type?, applied_to_id?, source_amount_cents, source_currency, target_plan_id? }. Computes the hypothetical discount + final amount for a proposed cart line. Read-only — never inserts a redemption row. Response: { is_applicable, refusal_reason?, discount_amount_cents, final_amount_cents, discount_snapshot }. Rate-limited.

Weekly usage rollup: coupons issued, coupons redeemed, total discount cents, clawback count, top campaign codes, per-issuance_source breakdown. Query params: period_start, period_end (default: last 7 days). Response includes signed S3 URL to a full CSV export when the range > 7 days.

groups.name: platform-coupons-support
groups.description: Cross-tenant coupon + redemption read for regulator-facing reporting + support intervention.

routes.description: Cross-tenant redemption ledger for regulator-facing reporting. filter[tenant_id], filter[redeemed_at.gte/lte], filter[reversed] (bool).
